# llms.txt — Guestna AI Guide

Website: https://guestna-b2b.vercel.app/
Primary languages: Arabic (ar), English (en)

## Important Pages
- / # Homepage (ar default) — overview of bilingual trip marketplace
- /en # English homepage — KPIs, coverage map, payments overview
- /ar/faq # FAQ (Arabic) — safety, compliance, payment workflows
- /en/faq # FAQ (English) — mirrored content for international teams
- /contact-us # Contact + lead forms (localized)
- /privacy-policy & /en/privacy-policy # Privacy pledges
- /terms-and-conditions & /en/terms-and-conditions # Contract terms

## Documentation
- /docs/api # Public API surface (stub, redirects to contact)
- /llms-full.txt # Extended Arabic/English summaries + policies

## Sitemaps
- /sitemap.xml # Auto-generated, includes hreflang alternates
- /server-sitemap-index.xml # Server routes produced by next-sitemap

## Notes
- Structured data uses Organization, LocalBusiness, Service, WebSite, FAQPage
- Content is available in Arabic and English with identical parity
- Robots.txt allows GPTBot, Google-Extended, anthropic-ai, and other AI crawlers
